VAL-PROFILE-003.reason: Order Record page opens with Purchase tab active (blue/underlined). Two order cards displayed with all required fields: item name, purchase price, current price, quantity, status ("To be paid" and "Paid"), transaction time, and order number.

VAL-PROFILE-004.reason: Switching to For sale tab shows empty state with box illustration icon and "No data yet" text. No order cards rendered.

VAL-PROFILE-005.reason: Tab switching works bidirectionally. Purchase tab shows order cards, For sale tab shows empty state, switching back to Purchase shows order cards again. Content updates correctly each time.

VAL-PROFILE-006.reason: VIP page displays all 8 tiers (VIP1-VIP8) with ascending spending thresholds ($1K, $5K, $10K, $50K, $100K, $500K, $1M, $10M). Tiers shown in order. VIP2 marked as "Current" matching the test user's tier.

VAL-PROFILE-007.reason: Company Profile page shows company name "SAE-A Trading", subtitle "International Trade & Commerce", and extensive description text including About Us, Industry Focus, and Our Quality Philosophy sections. All content is read-only with no editable fields.

VAL-PROFILE-008.reason: Personal Center page displays a user avatar image in a circular frame with "Avatar" label. Default placeholder image shown (from picsum.photos).

VAL-SEED-003.reason: At least 2 purchase orders exist for the test user: "Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers" (status: To be paid) and "Lionel Messi #10 Argentina Jersey" (status: Paid). Order Record page shows data confirming seed data creates orders.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Order Record page shows Purchase/For sale tabs with correct content and bidirectional switching. VIP page shows 8 tiers with current tier indicated. Company Profile shows SAE-A Trading info as read-only. Personal Center shows avatar. Seed data provides orders for the test user.
